requirement_topic.en: Connector Interoperability — GB/T 20234 vs IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2
requirement_topic.zh: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234与IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2
requirement_topic.zht: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234與IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2

summary.en: Maldives EV charging projects are expected to follow the IEC connector direction used by IEC-aligned markets, with IEC 62196-2 Type 2 for AC charging and IEC 62196-3 Combined Charging System Combo 2 (CCS2) for DC fast charging where DC infrastructure is specified. J1772 / Type 1 should not be assumed for Maldives projects, and China GB/T connectors should not be treated as acceptable unless a project specification explicitly requires them. IEC 62196 conformity becomes a mandatory project requirement when specified by MED, the utility, a tender, site owner, or charge-point operator.
summary.zh: 马尔代夫电动汽车充电项目预期采用IEC体系市场的接口方向：交流充电采用IEC 62196-2 Type 2，直流快充在指定直流基础设施时采用IEC 62196-3联合充电系统Combo 2（CCS2）。不应假定马尔代夫项目采用J1772 / Type 1，也不应将中国GB/T接口视为可接受，除非项目规范明确要求。IEC 62196符合性在MED、公用事业、招标、场地方或充电点运营商规范中被指定时，即成为项目强制要求。
summary.zht: 馬爾地夫電動汽車充電項目預期採用IEC體系市場的接口方向：交流充電採用IEC 62196-2 Type 2，直流快充在指定直流基礎設施時採用IEC 62196-3聯合充電系統Combo 2（CCS2）。不應假定馬爾地夫項目採用J1772 / Type 1，也不應將中國GB/T接口視為可接受，除非項目規範明確要求。IEC 62196符合性在MED、公用事業、招標、場地方或充電點運營商規範中被指定時，即成為項目強制要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62196-2 — Dimensional compatibility and interchangeability requirements for a.c. pin and contact-tube accessories
IEC 62196-3 — Dimensional compatibility and interchangeability requirements for DC and AC/DC pin and contact-tube vehicle couplers
IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC electric vehicle supply equipment

summary.en: China AC chargers use GB/T 20234.2 couplers and DC fast chargers use GB/T 20234.3 couplers. GB/T AC couplers and IEC 62196 Type 2 differ in connector gender, signaling, and contact arrangement, while GB/T DC couplers differ physically and use GB/T 27930 CAN communication rather than the CCS2 communication stack. A China GB/T charger is therefore not plug-compatible with IEC Type 2 / CCS2 infrastructure.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充采用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。GB/T交流耦合器与IEC 62196 Type 2在接口性别、信号和触点排列上不同；GB/T直流耦合器在物理结构上不同，并采用GB/T 27930 CAN通信，而非CCS2通信栈。因此，中国GB/T充电桩不能与IEC Type 2 / CCS2基础设施插接兼容。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充採用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。GB/T交流耦合器與IEC 62196 Type 2在接口性別、信號和觸點排列上不同；GB/T直流耦合器在物理結構上不同，並採用GB/T 27930 CAN通訊，而非CCS2通訊棧。因此，中國GB/T充電樁不能與IEC Type 2 / CCS2基礎設施插接兼容。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20234.2-2015 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 2: AC charging coupler
GB/T 20234.3-2023 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 3: DC charging coupler
GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system for electric vehicles

gap.en: Conversion from GB/T to the Maldives IEC direction requires hardware redesign of the coupler, cable assembly, locking mechanism, proximity pilot and control pilot signaling, DC communication stack, labels, spare parts, temperature-rise evidence, and final-configuration testing. Adapters are not a compliance substitute for a project-specified IEC 62196 Type 2 or CCS2 charger. Confirm the required connector family before quotation and procurement.
gap.zh: 从GB/T转换为马尔代夫IEC方向，需要重新设计耦合器、电缆组件、锁止机构、接近导引和控制导引信号、直流通信栈、标签、备件、温升证据及最终配置测试。转接器不能替代项目指定的IEC 62196 Type 2或CCS2充电桩合规设计。报价和采购前须确认所需接口体系。
gap.zht: 從GB/T轉換為馬爾地夫IEC方向，需要重新設計耦合器、電纜組件、鎖止機構、接近導引和控制導引信號、直流通訊棧、標籤、備件、溫升證據及最終配置測試。轉接器不能替代項目指定的IEC 62196 Type 2或CCS2充電樁合規設計。報價和採購前須確認所需接口體系。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 is required by MED, utility, tender, site owner, or charge-point-operator specification; GB/T physical incompatibility requires hardware redesign
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 conformity applies to China domestic connector design and is not an IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat Maldives projects as IEC Type 2 / CCS2 unless the project documents state otherwise. GB/T chargers need hardware and protocol redesign for IEC 62196 deployment; J1772 / Type 1 should not be assumed.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 除非项目文件另有说明，应按IEC Type 2 / CCS2处理马尔代夫项目。GB/T充电桩用于IEC 62196部署需要硬件和协议重新设计；不应假定采用J1772 / Type 1。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 除非項目文件另有說明，應按IEC Type 2 / CCS2處理馬爾地夫項目。GB/T充電樁用於IEC 62196部署需要硬體和協議重新設計；不應假定採用J1772 / Type 1。
